Romance & Dating Scams

Guides covering romance scams, fake profiles, and relationship fraud on dating apps and social platforms.

Romance & Dating Scams

Romance Scam Signs: How to Protect Yourself on UK Dating Apps

Romance scams cost UK victims thousands annually. This guide outlines common warning signs such as quick declarations of love, requests for money, reluctance to video call, and inconsistent personal details. Learn how to verify profiles, protect your information, and report suspicious activity on dating apps.

Updated 2026-04-17

Romance & Dating Scams

Tinder Scams in the UK: How to Protect Yourself from Romance and Financial Fraud

A comprehensive guide to understanding common Tinder scams targeting UK users, including romance fraud, catfishing, fake investment schemes, and payment fraud. Discover practical tips to verify profiles, spot warning signs, and report suspicious activity to stay safe while online dating.

Updated 2026-04-17

Romance & Dating Scams

Romance Scam Slow-Burn Patterns: Why Long Conversations Still End in Fraud

How trust-building romance scams develop over time and the signs to notice before money is requested.

Updated 2026-04-03
